biography: Italian Renaissance polymath known for masterpieces like the Mona Lisa and The Last Supper.
name: Leonardo da Vinci

biography: Dutch post-impressionist painter famous for works like Starry Night and Sunflowers.
name: Vincent van Gogh

biography: Spanish artist and co-founder of the Cubist movement, one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.
name: Pablo Picasso

biography: Mexican painter known for powerful self-portraits exploring identity, pain, and culture.
name: Frida Kahlo

biography: French painter and founder of the Impressionist movement, known for Water Lilies.
name: Claude Monet

biography: Spanish surrealist artist famous for dreamlike imagery and melting clocks.
name: Salvador Dalí

biography: Anonymous street artist known for politically charged graffiti and satirical artwork.
name: Banksy

biography: American pop artist known for works featuring Campbell’s soup cans and celebrity portraits.
name: Andy Warhol

biography: Italian Renaissance sculptor and painter known for the Sistine Chapel ceiling and David.
name: Michelangelo
